title: Fact check: Did Tyla really get N3on kicked out of a Celebrity Dinner in Monaco? What really happened during the livestream
summary_full: A viral social media rumor falsely claimed singer Tyla got streamer N3on removed from a celebrity dinner in Monaco after he filmed her during a livestream. The controversy exploded after several X accounts misidentified an Instagram model as the Grammy-winning artist. Posts alleged security threats and a heated confrontation, but fans later pointed out the woman in the video was not Tyla. The incident quickly became another example of how misinformation spreads online when viral clips and celebrity culture collide.
